adjudication.reason: The section text matches the fallback and explicitly states that no license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted except a limited right to use, which is compliant with the rule against granting licenses or ownership rights in Confidential Information.

items.prompt:
Redline Gym answer-key defect adjudication.
Given the rule position, fallback, and the contract section text, decide whether the section contains a GENUINE violation of the rule. Treat text that matches or is more protective than the fallback as compliant. Return STRICT JSON only: {"genuine": true|false, "reason": "..."}.

Rule R-010 position:
The NDA should not grant licenses or ownership rights in Confidential Information.

Fallback:
No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure of Confidential Information except the limited right to use it as expressly permitted by this Agreement.

Section text:
## 10. No License; Ownership

All Confidential Information remains the property of Discloser. No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure except the limited right to use Confidential Information as expressly permitted by this Agreement.
items.quote: No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure except the limited right to use Confidential Information as expressly permitted by this Agreement.
items.raw_response: {"genuine": false, "reason": "The section text matches the fallback and explicitly states that no license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted except a limited right to use, which is compliant with the rule against granting licenses or ownership rights in Confidential Information."}
items.section_text:
## 10. No License; Ownership

All Confidential Information remains the property of Discloser. No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure except the limited right to use Confidential Information as expressly permitted by this Agreement.
